accreditation.heading: Accreditation & Certification
accreditation.description: Candelaria Institute is recognized and accredited by national organizations, ensuring quality and accessible education for all students.

items.name: TESDA Accredited
items.description: We offer programs recognized by the Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA), aligning with national competency standards.

items.name: Educational Service Contracting PEAC Certified
items.description: As a PEAC-certified institution, we participate in the ESC program to support affordable and quality private education for junior high school students.
